storySpine: A clue-driven story moves from baseline to disruption, investigation, reveal, treatment, and repair.

sceneMap.sceneFunction: Open the case and establish the first clue.
sceneMap.endState: The first suspicious change is visible.

beatMap.endState: They identify a suspicious visual pattern.
beatMap.changeCreated: The reader moves from orientation to suspicion.

pageAllocation.purpose: Orient the reader and plant the first clue.

pageRhythm.rhythm: Wide establishing panel followed by tighter clue emphasis.
pageRhythm.pageEndingEffect: Suspicion increases without naming the disease.

panelTransitionLogic.readerInference: The clue causes the detectives to investigate deeper.
panelTransitionLogic.causality: The next panel follows directly from the observed pattern.

textImageRedundancyChecks.note: Lettering adds interpretation instead of repeating the image.

findings.message: Panel has a clear state change.
